title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
